question: How many GPUs are integrated into a single GB200 NVL72 rack?
findings: The GB200 NVL72 rack integrates 72 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs alongside 36 NVIDIA Grace CPUs.
The GB200 NVL72 compute tray houses 4 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs per 1U node, and the rack contains 10 compute trays to yield 72 Blackwell GPUs total.

The GB200 NVL72 is a fully liquid-cooled rack-scale design that interconnects all nodes with NVIDIA NVLink technology and delivers the performance of 'one big GPU', with 36 Grace CPUs and 72 Blackwell GPUs.
The GB200 NVL72 rack includes 5th Gen NVIDIA NVLink technology and an NVLink domain delivering 130 TB/s of low-latency GPU communication across its 72 Blackwell GPUs.
The NVIDIA Blackwell NVL72 was identified as the first rack-scale architecture, elevating the rack to the primary unit of integration, and is the predecessor platform to Vera Rubin NVL72.
